channel.title: Homes on Mohammad Ali Zamani
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on Mohammad Ali Zamani

item.title: Academic
item.description: The highly flexible website framework for Hugo with an extensible plugin mechanism. Create a beautifully simple site in under 10 minutes 🚀 Latest release Star

Biography I am a research associate at University of Hamburg. My research interests include Deep Reinforcement Learning, Cognetive Robotics, and Natural Language Processing. I am passionate about deep learning and AI with a focus on deep reinforcement learning and its applications in robotics. My goal is to build a reinforcement learning model for robots to safely interact in a domestic environment using natural language instructions in a human-robot interaction scenario.

item.title: Teaching and Advising
item.description: Advising Master Thesis: Adapting to User Context in a Reinforcement Learning-based Dialogue System by Mehran Sheikholeslami Master Thesis: Reinforcement Learning for Incremental Dialogue Management by Thi Linh Chi Master Thesis: Knowledge Extraction from API Reference Documentation Using Deep Learning by Alireza Mollaalizadehbahnemiri Seminar Project: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Playing Games Seminar Project: Playing Text-based games with Deep Reinforcement Learning Seminar Project: Helping a Deep Reinforcement Learning Agent with Natural Language Instructions to Play a Video Game TAship Introduction to Machine Learning & Artificial Neural Networks, Ozyegin University, Spring 2013, Spring 2014, and Spring 2015.

item.title: Trainings and Summer Schools
item.description: ACAI Summer School on Reinforcement Learning, Temporal Abstraction, Deep RL, Multi-Agent, Off Policy RLs, Nieuwpoort, Belgium Oct. 2017 Winter School on Humanoid Robot Programming: ROS, YARP, Kinematics, Dynamics, Vision, Santa Margherita Ligure, Italy Feb. 2017 Robot Workshop: ROS, LBR iiwa KUKA and Care-O-Bot programming, Stuttgart, Germany Dec. 2016 KUKA robot Training: KUKA Simulation Software, Istanbul, Turkey Jan. 2014

item.title: Awards
item.description: Marie SkIodowska-Curie Fellowship - SECURE Project 2016-2019 ICRA 2018 PhD forum travel grant award May 2018 Accepted project to “Science is Wonder-ful! - European Researchers’ Night” event Sep. 2018
